title: El Calafate, Santa Cruz — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to El Calafate, Santa Cruz: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

El Calafate is a city in Santa Cruz with a population of 28,000. Patagonia’s glacier tourism capital on the shores of Lake Argentino, gateway to Perito Moreno Glacier.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
